title.en: The Thunder Tribulation Palace Master agreed.

content.en:
Another reason why the Thunder Tribulation Palace Lord didn't dare to go back was the strength of Black Wind Mountain, which was really powerful, even stronger than their Heavenly Emperor Palace!

Not to mention the extremely mysterious Wind Mountain Lord, just Ye Tian and Jinchen Dao Ancestor are the two Great Realm Half Step Domain Ancestor combat power!

And the Heavenly Emperor Palace only has two half-step domain ancestors in the One Realm, and neither of them is the opponent of the Wind Mountain Lord, if he regrets it, and fights with the Black Wind Mountain, the Heavenly Emperor Palace will suffer a lot at all.

Besides, it is only 50 places for the Ancient Origin Lake, and it is not a great opportunity, so let it go.

"Okay, I'll give you 50 places!"

The Thunder Tribulation Palace Master agreed.

"Hahaha, thank you Thunder Tribulation Palace Master!"

Ye Tian was very happy.

Then, Ye Tian flew to the side of the half-step domain ancestors of Black Wind Mountain.

At this time, these half-step domain ancestors saw that Ye Tian's gaze was completely different, and they all had a look of admiration.

Especially Jinchen Daozu, he also had a different idea of Ye Tian.

Previously, Ye Tian had the half-step domain ancestor combat power of the Ten Thousand Things Realm, which was two concepts with the half-step domain ancestor combat power of the One Realm and the one-step domain ancestor!

Once Ye Tian broke through to the half-step domain ancestor level, how terrifying his combat power was, it was definitely stronger than him!

"Wanfa Dao Ancestor, your strength is too strong, with the invincible Dao Ancestor realm, you actually have the combat power of the Returning One Realm Half-step Domain Ancestor!"

Jin Chen Daozu exclaimed.

"My strength is not strong enough, I still need to continue to improve!"

Ye Tian said modestly.

"Still need to improve?"

Jin Chen Daozu was really hit.

At his level, it would be very difficult for him to continue to improve, although as long as there were long years, he could be promoted to the extreme of the Returning Realm Half-Step Domain Ancestor, and even to the Domain Ancestor level in the infinite future.

But those years were too long, so long that he might not be confident that there would be no accidents along the way, and he might die in a battle.

Therefore, he really doesn't have much pursuit of improving his strength.

Therefore, listening to Ye Tian's words, he was very shocked.

"Let the Supreme Dao Ancestors and Invincible Dao Ancestors enter the Ancient Origin Lake!"

Jin Chen Dao Ancestor Dao.

Suddenly, the fifty Supreme Dao Ancestors of the Human Race, together with some Supreme Dao Ancestors and Invincible Dao Ancestors of Black Wind Mountain, entered the Origin Lake inside the Ancient Realm Tree, and the Supreme Dao Ancestors and Invincible Dao Ancestors of the Heavenly Emperor Palace also entered.

As for the supreme Dao Ancestors and Invincible Dao Ancestors of other forces, they were not qualified to enter at all, unless they could compete with the Heavenly Emperor Palace and the half-step domain ancestors of Black Wind Mountain.

But they couldn't compete, so they couldn't compete for this opportunity.

Of course.

They can also cultivate nearby, and they have the amplification effect of the Ancient Realm Tree, and if they practice here, they will be much faster than they can practice in other places.

The only pity is that the Ancient Realm Fruit of the Ancient Realm Tree has not yet been born, otherwise they would have a chance to snatch the Ancient Realm Fruit.

Time passed little by little, and one by one, the strongest Dao Ancestors and the invincible Dao Ancestors successfully condensed into the Ancient Realm Body in the Origin Lake inside the Ancient Realm Tree, and their strength increased one by one, and then they came out from inside the Ancient Realm Tree.

About three years have passed, all the Supreme Dao Ancestors and Invincible Dao Ancestors have come out, and there is only a little bit of origin energy left in the Ancient Origin Lake, and there are about a dozen or so people left to condense into the Ancient Realm Body.

The Heavenly Emperor Palace and the Black Wind Mountain also couldn't look down on this bit of origin energy, so they gave it to other forces.

As for who of the other forces can snatch these origin energies, they don't have to worry about it.

......

Devouring Realm.

Ye Tian's copy body is still working as a spy here as a spy, and he usually sleeps, and he doesn't run around, so as not to be suspected by other devouring clans.

this day.

A message came that all the Devourers had to go to a meeting, an order from the Lords at the top of the Devourers.

The Devouring Temple in the center of the Devouring Realm.

A Devouring Clan came here, and about 160 Devouring Clans gathered here, and Ye Tian's identity as an invincible Dao Ancestor level Devouring Clan was not high here, so he could only sit in the corner.

Abrupt.

The four tall Devouring Clans descended one by one, and these four people were the Returning Realm Half-Step Domain Ancestor level in the Devouring Clan, and none of them were just entering the Returning Realm Half-Step Domain Ancestor level, but the top Returning Realm Half-Step Domain Ancestor.

Of course, they are not necessarily stronger than the Dragon Shadow Palace Master, because their combat methods are relatively simple, they are just strong in cultivation, and their combat effectiveness is not strong.

But the four Guiyi Realm Half-Step Domain Ancestors were also very terrifying, plus the twenty or so Ten Thousand Things Realm Half-Step Domain Ancestors, it was enough to see how terrifying the strength of the Devouring Clan was.

Moreover, this is not necessarily all the Devouring Clan's combat power, what if there is still some powerful Unified Realm half-step domain ancestor hidden or a domain ancestor!

The four Unified Realm Devouring Clans are called Emperor Ancestors in the Devouring Clan!

They are the White Deer Emperor Ancestor, the Blood Emperor Ancestor, the War Emperor Ancestor, and the Wanzhen Emperor Ancestor.

The status of the four emperor ancestors is very fast in the Devouring Clan, because they are now the most powerful, and the other Devouring Clans naturally dare not be enemies of these four Devouring Clans, otherwise if they kill them, they will also be killed.

After all, the Devouring Clans are competing with each other, but the worlds that the Four Great Emperor Ancestors need to devour are relatively advanced, and they can't look down on ordinary universes and worlds, otherwise where will they be kept!

Seeing that the clansmen were almost here, the White Deer Emperor Ancestor spoke: "Everyone, the Xuanxu to the Ancient Realm in the realm was born, and its origin is not weaker than the domain realm. We promise that all the worlds within this Xuanxu to the Ancient Realm will be given to you to devour, and our four great emperors will only devour the origin of the Xuanxu to the Ancient Realm. In addition, there are a large number of worlds, universes, and chaos continents in the realm, so there is enough for you to devour. "

"Emperor Ancestor, do you want to do something to the Xuanxu to the Ancient Realm now, do you want to let them continue to develop?"

Killing Wind spoke.

"Don't let them continue to develop, in case their strength is many times stronger, it will be difficult for us to do it, while their strength is not strong, strike first, it's a big deal not to kill them all, only kill the top existence, and let the remaining cultivators go, let them continue to create the Dao Realm in the realm, and serve us forever!"

The Blood Emperor Ancestor smiled cruelly.

Ye Tian looked at this scene and felt very funny.

These Devouring Clans don't investigate now, the Xuanxu to the Ancient Realm now has more than four Returning Realm Half-Step Domain Ancestors, if they attack the Xuanxu to the Ancient Realm, I'm afraid they will suffer heavy losses.

Of course, the loss from Xuanxu to the Ancient Realm must be even greater.

As for who will win and who will lose, it is not easy to say at the moment.

But it is only at the level of the half-step domain ancestor, and the Xuanxu to the Ancient Realm is at a disadvantage.
